pytorch.reason: load-bearing: SU(3) requires both M†M = I AND det(M) = 1; torch complex128 ops verify both constraints for Gell-Mann exponentiated elements.

pyg.reason: not used: this probe isolates SU(3) shell-local properties; cross-shell coupling is deferred per four-sim-kinds doctrine.

z3.reason: load-bearing: z3 UNSAT proves that |det|=1 AND det=1 AND det≠1 is impossible; SU(3) det=1 constraint strictly excludes U(3)\SU(3).

sympy.reason: load-bearing: sympy verifies [T_a, T_b] = i f_abc T_c for Gell-Mann generators; computes su(3) structure constants for the first few pairs.

clifford.reason: load-bearing: SU(2) ≅ Spin(3) is the double cover of SO(3); SU(2) ⊂ SU(3); Clifford Cl(3,0) rotors identify the SU(2) subgroup structure.

geomstats.reason: load-bearing: geomstats SpecialUnitary(n=3) provides the SU(3) group manifold; identity element verified as a member of the manifold.

e3nn.reason: load-bearing: e3nn SO(3) irreps are SU(2) irreps by double cover; SU(2) ⊂ SU(3) means SU(3) representations decompose into SU(2) irreps.

rustworkx.reason: load-bearing: rustworkx encodes SU(3) as interior node in G-tower; parent=U(3), child=Sp(6); lies on the unique path from GL to Sp.

su2_embedded_in_SU3.detail: SU(2) block embedded in SU(3): M†M=I and det=1

gell_mann_exponent_in_SU3.detail: exp(i*t*lambda_3) is in SU(3): M†M=I and det=1

z3_su_det1_exclusive.detail: z3 UNSAT: det=1 and det≠1 cannot coexist; SU excludes U\SU elements

su3_generators_traceless.detail: All 8 Gell-Mann generators T_a are traceless: su(n) tracelessness

su3_generators_hermitian.detail: All 8 Gell-Mann generators T_a are Hermitian (su(n) convention)

clifford_su2_rotor_unit_norm.detail: SU(2) ⊂ SU(3): Spin(3) rotor R satisfies R~R = 1 in Cl(3,0)

clifford_even_subalgebra_is_su2.detail: Cl(3,0)^+ (even subalgebra) = span{1, e12, e13, e23} ≅ H ≅ SU(2)

su3_8_generators_not_9.detail: su(3) has 8 generators (3^2 - 1 = 8): tracelessness removes 1 from u(3)'s 9
